styling_rules.global_background: radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(139,92,246,0.12), transparent 40%), radial-gradient(circle at bottom right, rgba(88,28,135,0.12), transparent 40%), #0A0A0C
styling_rules.cards: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#121217] to-[#0A0A0C] border border-white/5 shadow-[0_20px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] backdrop-blur-xl rounded-3xl

buttons.primary: bg-violet-600 hover:bg-violet-500 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-sm font-semibold tracking-widest uppercase transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(124,58,237,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 hover:border-white/40 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-sm font-semibold tracking-widest uppercase transition-all

abstract_imagery_instructions.CRITICAL_RULE: ABSOLUTELY NO PHOTO URLs ALLOWED. DO NOT USE ANY PLACEHOLDER IMAGES. EVERYTHING MUST BE CSS OR SVG.
abstract_imagery_instructions.product_bottles: Create CSS-only representations of bottles. Use a container with `w-24 h-64 sm:w-32 sm:h-80 rounded-[40px] bg-gradient-to-b from-zinc-800 via-zinc-900 to-black border border-white/10 relative overflow-hidden shadow-2xl`. Add a smaller nested div at the top for the cap `w-10 h-12 bg-zinc-950 rounded-t-lg mx-auto -mt-12`. Add an absolute positioned glowing orb behind the bottle for premium lighting effects: `absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-32 h-32 bg-violet-600/30 blur-3xl rounded-full -z-10`.
abstract_imagery_instructions.swirl_motifs: Use SVG paths to draw elegant, overlapping curves (resembling hair strands/curls). Animate them using Framer Motion `initial={{ pathLength: 0 }} animate={{ pathLength: 1 }}`. Apply `stroke-violet-500/20` and `fill-transparent`. Position these SVGs absolutely in the background of Hero and Quote sections.
abstract_imagery_instructions.noise_texture: Implement a site-wide noise overlay to kill digital flatness. A fixed `div` covering the viewport with `pointer-events-none z-50 opacity-[0.03] mix-blend-overlay` and an SVG filter generating feColorMatrix noise.
abstract_imagery_instructions.status_labels: For product cards, use small absolute positioned badges: `absolute top-4 right-4 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 text-[10px] tracking-[0.2em] uppercase px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-white`.

pages_and_components: Home: Hero with animated SVG swirl, dual CTA. Trust strip (lucide icons). Formula philosophy bento grid.
Shop/Products: CSS abstract bottle grid. Status labels (Testing, Planned, Coming Soon).
Product Detail: 2-column layout. Sticky CSS bottle (left), scrolling specs/ingredients (right).
Curl Quiz: Interactive Framer Motion multi-step form. Large typography. Data collection.
About: Founder story using typography and abstract layout. Text-based wordmark logo emphasis.
Ingredients: Minimalist periodic-table style grid of ingredients.
Testing & Safety: Clinical, Swiss-grid layout for data transparency.
Athletes & Active Curls: High-contrast typography sections, 'Performance Pro' energy translated to dark luxury.
Perm Care: Accordion-heavy FAQ style layout.
FAQ: Clean Shadcn Accordion customized for dark mode.
Shipping & Returns, Privacy Policy, Terms of Service: Beautiful text-heavy markdown-style layouts with max-w-3xl.
Global: Sticky glassmorphism header. Massive py-32 footer with legal links.

accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, quiz choices).
accessibility.contrast: Ensure white/zinc text passes WCAG AA against the deep background.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for the SVG tracing animations.

spacing_and_layout.general: Extremely generous padding. Use py-24 or py-32 for section vertical rhythm.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grids: For philosophy and features, use Mode A (Tetris grid) mixing col-span-4, col-span-8 to create asymmetrical tension.
